sentences.target: Ich kündige morgen mein Abonnement beim Fitnessstudio.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkʏndɪɡə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ maɪ̯n abɔnəˈmɑ̃ː baɪ̯m ˈfɪtnɛsˌʃtuːdi̯o./

translations.de: Ich kündige morgen mein Abonnement beim Fitnessstudio.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkʏndɪɡə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ maɪ̯n abɔnəˈmɑ̃ː baɪ̯m ˈfɪtnɛsˌʃtuːdi̯o./
translations.en: I’m canceling my subscription at the gym.
translations.es: Mañana me doy de baja del gimnasio.
translations.fr: Je résilie mon abonnement à la salle demain.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天要取消健身房的会员。
translations.yue: 我聽日會取消健身房嘅會籍。
translations.ru: Завтра я отменю абонемент в спортзале.
translations.pt: Vou cancelar meu plano da academia amanhã.
translations.he: מחר אני מבטל את המנוי בחדר הכושר.
translations.tr: Yarın spor salonu üyeliğimi iptal edeceğim.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ hủy đăng ký ở phòng gym.
translations.ar: سألغي اشتراكي في النادي الرياضي غدًا.
translations.nl: Morgen zeg ik mijn sportschoolabonnement op.
translations.uk: Завтра я скасую свій абонемент у спортзалі.
translations.hi: मैं कल जिम की सदस्यता रद्द कर रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Jutro zrezygnuję z karnetu na siłownię.
translations.el: Αύριο ακυρώνω τη συνδρομή μου στο γυμναστήριο.
translations.nb: I morgen sier jeg opp medlemskapet mitt på treningssenteret.
translations.id: Besok aku akan membatalkan keanggotaan di gym.
translations.sv: I morgon säger jag upp mitt gymkort.
translations.ro: Mâine îmi anulez abonamentul la sală.
translations.cs: Zítra zruším své členství v posilovně.
translations.da: Jeg opsiger mit medlemskab i fitnesscentret i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日ジムの会員を解約します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Finite main verb, present 1st person singular; expresses terminating something.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular) modifying the noun.
Neuter noun; direct object (accusative) of the verb.
Preposition contracted with ‘dem’ (bei + dem), governing dative; introduces location/affiliation.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition ‘bei’; denotes the place.

sentences.target: Das Abonnement kostet neun Euro im Monat.
sentences.reading: /das abɔnəˈmɑ̃ː ˈkɔstət nɔɪ̯n ˈɔʏ̯ʁo ɪm ˈmoːnat./

translations.de: Das Abonnement kostet neun Euro im Monat.
translations.ipa: /das abɔnəˈmɑ̃ː ˈkɔstət nɔɪ̯n ˈɔʏ̯ʁo ɪm ˈmoːnat./
translations.en: The subscription costs nine euros per month.
translations.es: La suscripción cuesta nueve euros al mes.
translations.fr: L’abonnement coûte neuf euros par mois.
translations.it: L’abbonamento costa nove euro al mese.
translations.ru: Абонемент стоит девять евро в месяц.
translations.pt: A assinatura custa nove euros por mês.
translations.vi: Đăng ký có giá chín euro mỗi tháng.
translations.nl: Het abonnement kost negen euro per maand.
translations.uk: Абонемент коштує дев’ять євро на місяць.
translations.hu: Az előfizetés havi kilenc euróba kerül.
translations.hi: सदस्यता की कीमत नौ यूरो प्रति माह है।
translations.el: Η συνδρομή κοστίζει εννιά ευρώ το μήνα.
translations.nb: Abonnementet koster ni euro per måned.
translations.id: Langganan ini harganya sembilan euro per bulan.
translations.sv: Abonnemanget kostar nio euro i månaden.
translations.ro: Abonamentul costă nouă euro pe lună.
translations.da: Abonnementet koster ni euro om måneden.
translations.fi: Tilauksen hinta on yhdeksän euroa kuukaudessa.
translations.ja: サブスクリプションは月9ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter nominative singular, modifying ‘Abonnement’.
Neuter noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; expresses price.
Cardinal number quantifying the following currency unit.
Currency unit; measure noun in an amount expression.
Preposition contracted with ‘dem’ (in + dem), governing dative; forms a time phrase.
Noun in dative singular; complement of ‘in’ indicating the time frame (per month).

sentences.target: Du hast das Abonnement schon verlängert.

translations.de: Du hast das Abonnement schon verlängert.
translations.vi: Bạn đã gia hạn đăng ký rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt het abonnement al verlengd.
translations.hi: तुमने सदस्यता पहले ही नवीनीकृत कर ली है।
translations.ja: もうサブスクリプションを更新しました。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Auxiliary verb, present 2nd person singular; forms the present perfect with a participle.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular, modifying ‘Abonnement’.
Neuter noun; direct object in the clause.
Temporal adverb indicating prior completion.
Past participle of the lexical verb; complements the auxiliary to form the present perfect.

sentences.target: Er teilt sein Abonnement mit mir.

translations.de: Er teilt sein Abonnement mit mir.
translations.en: He shares his subscription with me.
translations.fr: Il partage son abonnement avec moi.
translations.it: Condivide il suo abbonamento con me.
translations.ru: Он делится со мной своим абонементом.
translations.pt: Ele compartilha a assinatura dele comigo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chia sẻ đăng ký của mình với tôi.
translations.nl: Hij deelt zijn abonnement met mij.
translations.uk: Він ділиться зі мною своїм абонементом.
translations.hi: वह अपनी सदस्यता मेरे साथ साझा करता है।
translations.pl: On dzieli się ze mną swoją subskrypcją.
translations.el: Μοιράζεται τη συνδρομή του μαζί μου.
translations.nb: Han deler abonnementet sitt med meg.
translations.sv: Han delar sitt abonnemang med mig.
translations.ro: El își împarte abonamentul cu mine.
translations.da: Han deler sit abonnement med mig.
translations.ja: 彼は私とサブスクリプションを共有しています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; denotes distributing/using jointly.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) modifying ‘Abonnement’.
Neuter noun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the comitative phrase.
1st person singular dative object pronoun, complement of ‘mit’.

Du hast das Abonnement schon verlängert.
Er teilt sein Abonnement mit mir.

/das abɔnəˈmɑ̃ː ˈkɔstət nɔɪ̯n ˈɔʏ̯ʁo ɪm ˈmoːnat./
en: I’m canceling my subscription at the gym.
The subscription costs nine euros per month.
He shares his subscription with me.
